questionText: Provide clarification on any other relevant information pertaining to your activities related to transfer and sequestration of CO2.
questionKo: clarification on any other relevant information pertaining to your activities related to transfer 및 sequestration of CO2.을/를 입력하십시오.
simpleHelp: Investors are looking to invest in a range of companies that have developed and utilized innovative and commercially viable CCS/U technologies. This question is designed to capture additional relevant information relating to the transfer and sequestration of CO2. It requests information on the consolidation basis used to report transfers and sequestration of CO2 emissions, who owns the transferred emissions and the risk management processes in place.

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes" in response to C7.66.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 you select "Yes" in response to C7.66.

guidance.text:
General 
Consolidation basis 
Indicate the consolidation basis (financial control, operational control, equity share) used to report transfers and sequestration of CO 2 emissions.
Provide clarification for cases in which different consolidation bases have been used (e.g. for a given activity, capture, injection or storage pathway).
Provide clarification on whether any oil reservoirs and/or sequestration system (geological or oceanic) have been included within the organizational boundary of the reporting organization.
Provide details, including degrees to which reservoirs are shared with other entities.
Ownership of transferred emissions 
Explain who (e.g. the reporting organization) owns the transferred emissions and what potential liabilities are attached.
In the case of sequestered emissions, please clarify whether the reporting organization or one or more third parties owns the sequestered emissions and who has potential liability for them.
Risk management 
Provide details of risk management performed by the reporting organization and/or third party in relation to its CCS/U activities.
This should cover pre-operational evaluation of the storage (e.g. site characterization), operational monitoring, closure monitoring, remediation for CO 2 leakage, and results of third party verification.
guidance.textKo: 일반 Consolidation basis Indicate the consolidation basis (financial control, operational control, equity share) used to report transfers 및 sequestration of CO 2 emissions. Provide clarification for cases in which different consolidation bases have been used (e.g. for a given activity, capture, injection 또는 storage pathway). Provide clarification on whether 하나 이상 oil reservoirs 및/또는 sequestration system (geological 또는 oceanic) have been included within the 조직경계 의 reporting organization. 세부 정보를 입력, 포함 degrees to which reservoirs are shared with other entities. Ownership of transferred emissions Explain who (e.g. the reporting organization) owns the transferred emissions 및 what potential liabilities are attached. In the case of sequestered emissions, please clarify whether the reporting organization 또는 one 또는 more third parties owns the sequestered emissions 및 who has potential liability 에 대한m. Risk management 세부 정보를 입력 of risk management performed by the reporting organization 및/또는 third party in relation to its CCS/U activities. This 해야 합니다 cover pre-operational evaluation 의 storage (e.g. site characterization), operational monitoring, closure monitoring, remediation for CO 2 leakage, 및 results of third party 검증.

criteria.criteria:
Text answer provided - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: Text answer 입력 - 2 점 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다.
